interesting.title: Embedded Software Engineer, Navigation Algorithm
interesting.description_text:
Company Overview
Imagine a piloted air taxi that takes off vertically, then quietly carries you and your fellow passengers over the congested city streets below, enabling you to spend more time with the people and places that matter most. At Joby, we've been working to make that dream a reality since 2009 and we're now in the final stages of certifying our aircraft with the FAA. With plans to launch our aircraft in the US and Dubai, we're now scaling manufacturing and preparing for the launch of our commercial service.
Overview
The role involves developing, testing and deploying embedded drivers and algorithms for aircraft's flight sensors systems which are responsible for producing navigati
interesting.ai_benefits: ["Paid Time Off", "Healthcare Benefits", "401(k) Plan With Company Match", "Employee Stock Purchase Plan (ESPP)", "Short-term Disability Coverage", "Long-term Disability Coverage", "Life Insurance", "Restricted Stock Units (RSUs)"]
interesting.ai_key_skills: ["C++", "Python", "Object-Oriented Programming", "Bayesian Estimation", "Kalman Filtering", "Statistical Data Analysis", "Embedded System Architecture", "Sensor Fusion", "Version Control", "Digital Signal Processing", "DO-178C", "SIMD", "GPU", "FPGA"]
interesting.ai_core_responsibilities: Develop and deploy embedded drivers and algorithms for aircraft flight sensor systems to provide navigation and air data. Contribute to the conceptual system architectural design to ensure the safety of an electric fly-by-wire aircraft.
interesting.ai_requirements_summary: Requires a degree in aerospace, mechanical engineering, or computer science with 1-3+ years of industry experience depending on the degree level. Proficiency in C++, Python, Bayesian estimation, and Kalman filtering is essential.

interesting.title: Embedded Software Engineer Intern (Fall 2026)
interesting.description_text:
About Zipline
Zipline is the world’s largest and most experienced drone delivery service. We are on a mission to serve all humans equally by ensuring access to food, medicine and essential goods anytime, anywhere. We design, build, and operate the world’s largest autonomous logistics system, delivering critical supplies quickly and reliably. Today, Zipline operates on four continents, makes a delivery somewhere in the world every 30 seconds, and has completed millions of deliveries to date, including blood, vaccines, medical supplies, food, and retail products. 
Our customers include the world’s largest and most prominent healthcare systems, governments, retailers, restaurants and global bus
interesting.ai_key_skills: ["C", "C++", "Python", "Rust", "RTOS", "Embedded Linux", "Circuit Schematics", "Oscilloscope", "CAN", "SPI", "UART", "Electromechanical Systems", "Firmware Development", "Hardware-in-the-Loop", "Signal Integrity", "Perception Systems"]
interesting.ai_core_responsibilities: Develop and test safety-critical embedded software and firmware for autonomous aircraft and ground systems. This includes designing software platforms, implementing telemetry systems, and validating hardware performance through rigorous testing.
interesting.ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must be pursuing a degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or Computer Engineering and have completed at least two years of undergraduate study. Proficiency in C, C++, Python, or Rust and familiarity with basic electrical engineering concepts are required.

We’ll help keep your money boring so your life doesn’t have to be. 

pnc.co/guidelines
interesting.description_text:
R218982

Job Profile

Position Overview

At PNC, our people are our greatest differentiator and competitive advantage in the markets we serve. We are all united in delivering the best experience for our customers. We work together each day to foster an inclusive workplace culture where all of our employees feel respected, valued and have an opportunity to contribute to the company’s success. As a Software Engineer Principal within PNC's Enterprise Garage Tech Resiliency organization, you will be based in Pittsburgh, PA or Strongsville, OH.

This position is not available in all geographical areas

Needed Skills

5 years of experience in software development with strong focus on Python
Strong

interesting.linkedin_org_description:
CommuniTech are an exciting name in Tech Recruitment, seamlessly connecting the client & candidate communities to deliver exceptional technical talent to tech-driven companies. Ensuring that together, they will thrive, exceed, and achieve.

By striving to intertwine the communities, we get to know our clients and candidates better than ever before. Providing recruitment solutions that deliver an individual experience tailored to your needs.
interesting.description_text:
Software Engineer. C# or Java with AI Boston. Investment Bank. $120,000 - $200,,000+ Bonus and Benefits. 5 Days a week in office. Only US Citizens or Permanent residents. 

My client is an investment bank based in Boston. They are looking for several Junior Engineers.

The team is modernizing the banks legacy position keeping system.

If you are interested to learn more, please send a CV for immediate consideration.
interesting.ai_core_responsibilities: The Software Engineer will be involved in modernizing the bank's legacy position keeping system. The role requires collaboration with a team of engineers to implement new technologies.
interesting.ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have experience with C# or Java and an interest in AI. The position is suitable for junior engineers looking to grow their skills.
